ddls:
CREATE TABLE "queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query */,
  "sql_code" TEXT /* SQL code of the query */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of query (e.g., SELECT, UPDATE, DELETE) */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Time taken to execute the query in seconds */,
  "cpu_usage" REAL /* CPU usage of the query as a percentage */,
  "rows_returned" INTEGER /* Number of rows returned by the query */,
  "query_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the query was executed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the query */,
  "query_status" TEXT /* Status of the query (e.g., 'success', 'failed') */,
  "query_plan" TEXT /* Execution plan of the query */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_queries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the query type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the query type */,
  "is_transactional" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the query is part of a transaction */,
  "is_read_only" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the query is read-only */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "databases" (
  "database_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each database */,
  "database_name" TEXT /* Name of the database */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the database */,
  "host" TEXT /* Hostname or IP address of the database server */,
  "port" INTEGER /* Port number of the database server */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the database software */,
  "is_production" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the database is a production instance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("database_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_executions" (
  "execution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query execution */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query being executed */,
  "database_id" INTEGER /* ID of the database instance */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Time taken to execute the query in seconds */,
  "cpu_usage" REAL /* CPU usage of the query as a percentage */,
  "rows_returned" INTEGER /* Number of rows returned by the query */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage of the query in MB */,
  "io_operations" INTEGER /* Number of I/O operations performed by the query */,
  "query_plan" TEXT /* Execution plan of the query */,
  "query_status" TEXT /* Status of the query execution (e.g., 'success', 'failed') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("execution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_executions_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_executions_database_id FOREIGN KEY ("database_id") REFERENCES databases ("database_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user's account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query triggering the alert */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the query execution time */,
  "notification_time" TEXT /* Time when the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., 'execution_time', 'cpu_usage') */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the alert has been resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the alert */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_alerts_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_alerts_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query being analyzed */,
  "database_id" INTEGER /* ID of the database instance */,
  "avg_execution_time" REAL /* Average execution time of the query */,
  "max_execution_time" REAL /* Maximum execution time of the query */,
  "min_execution_time" REAL /* Minimum execution time of the query */,
  "std_dev_execution_time" REAL /* Standard deviation of the query execution time */,
  "avg_memory_usage" REAL /* Average memory usage of the query */,
  "avg_io_operations" INTEGER /* Average I/O operations performed by the query */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the trend data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_trends_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_trends_database_id FOREIGN KEY ("database_id") REFERENCES databases ("database_id")
)
